components.text: Sunny hourly report from ElectroSun. New conversations: {{1}}. Replies sent: {{2}}. Escalations: {{3}}. Top intent: {{4}}. Full breakdown in the dashboard.

_notes.purpose: Sent to OWNER_WHATSAPP every hour by node-cron in src/reports.js. Required because the cron may fire when the owner's last inbound message to Sunny is older than 24 hours, in which case free-form sends are blocked by Meta and only approved templates can be used.
_notes.category_reason: UTILITY because it is a stats update tied to the operational relationship between the owner and the platform, not promotional. Meta is generally lenient on internal-facing UTILITY templates.

variables.{{1}}: count of new conversations opened in the past hour (integer)
variables.{{4}}: top intent string from the classifier (e.g. feature_question, pricing_question)
